evidence: Android device model/API recorded in summaries.
Extended advertising support and max advertising data length recorded in Android logcat.
advertising_set_started records payload_size=80, scannable=true, connectable=false, data_carrier=scan_response, tx_power, window_ms, attempt_id, and payload base64.
iPad12,1 / iOS 26.5 observer and foreground scanner command recorded in summaries.
Both iOS logs have zero FF FF 4D 58 direct MX callback evidence.
Both iOS logs have zero received_message lines and zero decode lines for the direct AUX payload.
First probe observed 276 legacy_beacon_received lines while the direct AUX callback stayed at zero.
Rerun observed 120 legacy_beacon_received lines while the direct AUX callback stayed at zero.
docs/BLE_BRIDGE.md and docs/remaining_items_audit.md keep direct full-MX AUX delivery disabled for iOS until callback and canonical parse evidence exist.
external-blocker-recheck-1358 shows DairyPhoneDeaux iPhone 13 remains unavailable.

notes: This artifact does not complete direct full-MX AUX interop.
The negative runs prove Android scan-response emission and MB fallback visibility, but not iOS delivery of direct MX manufacturer data.
A future hardware/API path must add platform callback proof and canonical received_message/MX parse proof before direct_full_mx_aux_complete can be claimed.
